name: oxyresveratrol
summary: Mulberry stilbene linked to carbohydrate-processing and signaling effects.
description: Oxyresveratrol (a mulberry stilbene) may affect carbohydrate-related pathways and stress-response signaling, influencing metabolic homeostasis.
safetyNotes: Available human trial evidence identified here is topical and cannot establish oral supplement safety. Oral dose-response, bleeding, blood pressure, blood sugar, pregnancy, breastfeeding, surgery, liver, kidney, and medication-interaction safety should not be inferred from resveratrol or laboratory metabolism studies.
